div.p: Pick your date, time, and party size — then choose your preferred table from our live floor plan.

t.div: Invalid date/time. You cannot make a reservation for a past date or time. Please select a future slot.

div.label: Start Time
div.div: This time slot is in the past. Please choose a later time.

div.p: No available tables for your selected criteria.
Try a different date, time, or reduce the number of guests.

t.div: Please select enough tables to accommodate guests.

input.name: notes
input.placeholder: e.g. window seat, birthday, dietary needs

div.p: Thank you! Your table is reserved. A confirmation email has been sent to you.
Explore our handcrafted dishes, fresh ingredients, and signature flavours.

a.t-att-class: 'categ-pill' + (' active' if active_categ and active_categ.id == cat.id else '')

div.p: Our menu is being updated. Check back soon!
Reserve your table now and enjoy the full experience.
